name: @stackra/analytics
purpose: Consent-gated, fan-out analytics manager over pluggable destinations (GA4, console) and marketing pixels (Meta, TikTok, Snapchat).
capabilities: Fan-out manager over N destinations with per-provider isolation
Built-in GA4, console, Meta, TikTok, Snapchat destinations
React bindings for hook-based page + event tracking
Testing subpath with recorded-event assertion helpers
when_to_use: Recording user events, marketing pixels, and cross-vertical funnel metrics with per-tenant consent enforcement.
when_not_to_use: For error reporting use @stackra/monitoring; for pure audit trails use the backend audit log.
